title: Fig. 1 140   Laboratory Manual
subject: Mathematics
objective:
To verify experimentally that the ratio
of the areas of two similar triangles is
equal to the ratio of the squares of their
corresponding sides.
Coloured papers, geometry box,
sketch pen, white paper, cardboard.
procedure:
1. Take a cardboard of a convenient size and paste a white paper on it.
2. Make a triangle (equilateral) on a coloured paper of side   x   units and cut it
out [see Fig. 1]. Call it a unit triangle.
3. Make sufficient number of triangles congruent to the unit triangle using
coloured papers.
observation:
By actual measurement:
BC =   ______________, IL = ______________, FH = ______________,
DE = ______________.
Let area of   ∆ ADE be 1 sq. unit. Then

discussion:
This result is useful in comparing the areas of two similar figures.
